sentences.target: Ich stelle die Schuhe in den Flur.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə diː ˈʃuːə ɪn deːn fluːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich stelle die Schuhe in den Flur.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə diː ˈʃuːə ɪn deːn fluːɐ̯/
translations.en: I put the shoes in the hallway.
translations.es: Dejo los zapatos en el pasillo.
translations.fr: Je mets les chaussures dans le couloir.
translations.vi: Tôi để đôi giày ở hành lang.
translations.nl: Ik zet de schoenen in de gang.
translations.hi: मैं जूते गलियारे में रखता हूँ।

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive verb meaning to place/set something; governs an accusative object.
Definite article, plural accusative; agrees with 'Schuhe' as the direct object.
Common noun, plural accusative; direct object of 'stelle'.
Preposition selecting accusative here to mark direction/motion toward a goal (allative). Introduces the PP 'in den Flur'.
Definite article, masculine singular accusative; required by 'in' with motion and agreeing with 'Flur'.
Common noun, masculine singular accusative; object of the preposition 'in', denoting the destination.

sentences.target: Sie telefoniert leise auf dem Flur.

translations.de: Sie telefoniert leise auf dem Flur.
translations.en: She’s on the phone quietly in the hallway.
translations.es: Está hablando por teléfono en voz baja en el pasillo.
translations.fr: Elle parle au téléphone à voix basse dans le couloir.
translations.it: Parla al telefono a bassa voce nel corridoio.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在走廊里小声打电话。
translations.yue: 佢喺走廊度細聲講電話。
translations.ru: Она тихо разговаривает по телефону в коридоре.
translations.pt: Ela fala ao telefone baixinho no corredor.
translations.vi: Cô ấy nói chuyện điện thoại nhỏ giọng ở hành lang.
translations.ar: هي تتحدث على الهاتف بهدوء في الممر.
translations.nl: Ze belt zachtjes in de gang.
translations.uk: Вона тихо говорить по телефону в коридорі.
translations.hi: वह गलियारे में धीरे से फोन पर बात कर रही है।
translations.pl: Ona cicho rozmawia przez telefon w korytarzu.
translations.el: Μιλάει στο τηλέφωνο χαμηλόφωνα στον διάδρομο.
translations.nb: Hun snakker lavt i telefonen i gangen.
translations.id: Dia berbicara di telepon dengan suara pelan di lorong.
translations.sv: Hon pratar tyst i telefon i hallen.
translations.ro: Ea vorbește la telefon încet pe hol.
translations.da: Hun taler stille i telefonen i gangen.
translations.ja: 彼女は廊下で小声で電話している。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive verb 'to talk on the phone'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'telefoniert', expressing that the action is performed quietly.
Preposition selecting dative here to indicate location (static); introduces the locative PP 'auf dem Flur' (idiomatically: in the hallway).
Definite article, masculine singular dative; governed by 'auf' in its locative use; agrees with 'Flur'.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of the preposition 'auf', expressing location.

sentences.target: Es zieht im Flur heute stark.

translations.de: Es zieht im Flur heute stark.
translations.en: It’s really drafty in the hallway today.
translations.es: Hay mucha corriente de aire en el pasillo hoy.
translations.fr: Il y a un fort courant d’air dans le couloir aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi nel corridoio c’è molta corrente d’aria.
translations.pt: Hoje há muita corrente de ar no corredor.
translations.tr: Bugün koridorda güçlü bir cereyan var.
translations.vi: Hôm nay hành lang gió lùa mạnh.
translations.ar: اليوم هناك تيار هوائي قوي في الممر.
translations.nl: Vandaag tocht het flink in de gang.
translations.hu: Ma erős huzat van a folyosón.
translations.hi: आज गलियारे में तेज़ हवा चल रही है।
translations.pl: Dzisiaj w korytarzu jest silny przeciąg.
translations.el: Σήμερα στον διάδρομο έχει δυνατό ρεύμα.
translations.nb: I dag trekker det skikkelig i gangen.
translations.id: Hari ini di lorong sangat berangin.
translations.sv: I dag drar det ordentligt i hallen.
translations.ro: Astăzi e curent puternic pe hol.
translations.cs: Dnes je na chodbě silný průvan.
translations.da: I dag trækker det meget i gangen.
translations.ja: 今日は廊下にすごいすきま風が吹いている。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun in nominative; syntactic subject (expletive) in a weather/ambient expression.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; impersonal use ('Es zieht' = there is a draft).
Preposition 'in' contracted with the article 'dem'; selects dative to mark static location; introduces the PP.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of 'im', specifying the location.
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame of the situation.
Degree/manner adverb; intensifies the verb 'zieht' (it is very drafty).

sentences.target: Im Flur hängt meine nasse Jacke.

translations.de: Im Flur hängt meine nasse Jacke.
translations.en: My wet jacket is hanging in the hallway.
translations.es: Mi chaqueta mojada está colgada en el pasillo.
translations.fr: Ma veste mouillée est accrochée dans le couloir.
translations.it: La mia giacca bagnata è appesa nel corridoio.
translations.ko: 젖은 제 재킷이 복도에 걸려 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我湿的外套挂在走廊里。
translations.yue: 我濕嘅外套掛喺走廊度。
translations.ru: Моя мокрая куртка висит в коридоре.
translations.pt: Minha jaqueta molhada está pendurada no corredor.
translations.vi: Áo khoác ướt của tôi đang treo ở hành lang.
translations.nl: Mijn natte jas hangt in de gang.
translations.uk: Моя мокра куртка висить у коридорі.
translations.hu: A vizes dzsekim a folyosón lóg.
translations.hi: मेरी भीगी जैकेट गलियारे में टंगी है।
translations.pl: Moja mokra kurtka wisi w korytarzu.
translations.el: Το βρεγμένο μου μπουφάν κρέμεται στον διάδρομο.
translations.nb: Den våte jakken min henger i gangen.
translations.sv: Min blöta jacka hänger i hallen.
translations.ro: Geaca mea udă atârnă în hol.
translations.cs: Moje mokrá bunda visí na chodbě.
translations.da: Min våde jakke hænger i gangen.
translations.ja: 私の濡れたジャケットが廊下に掛かっている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition 'in' contracted with 'dem'; selects dative to mark static location; sentence-initial PP as a locative frame setter.
Common noun, masculine singular dative; object of 'Im'.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive/stative use describing the position of an object.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative; agrees with 'Jacke' and marks possession.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Jacke'; mixed declension after a possessive determiner, feminine singular nominative (-e ending).
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; head of the subject phrase of 'hängt'.
